name: Herb Vinaigrette Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. For leafy green salads or sliced cucumbers and tomatoes.
2. Doubles as a tenderizing marinade for barbecuing meat (Use 1/3 cup dressing in a plastic bag to marinate 1 lb meat; use beef stock when marinating beef).
3. In a container with a tight-fitting lid, combine vinegar, chicken stock, lemon juice, and seasonings.
4. Shake well.
5. Add oil and shake again.
6. Refrigerate for up to two weeks.
Makes 3/4 cup, each serving 2 tablespoons
Fats & Oils: 1 gram carbohydrate, 5 grams fat, 46 calories
Source: Choice Menus by Marjorie H. Hollands and Margaret Howard (1993)
Shared by Elizabeth Rodier (Aug 93)
